scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && cp ./dist/server/src/index.d.ts ./dist/index.d.ts && cp ./dist/server/src/index.d.ts.map ./dist/index.d.ts.map && cp ./dist/server/src/types.d.ts ./dist/types.d.ts && cp ./dist/server/src/types.d.ts.map ./dist/types.d.ts.map && cp ./dist/server/src/app-types.d.ts ./dist/app-types.d.ts && cp ./dist/server/src/app-types.d.ts.map ./dist/app-types.d.ts.map
scripts.quality: bun run lint && bun run check-types && bun run test
